---
title: "Week 09"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (4/13)
:::

**Topics**

-   Midterm 2 details announced!
-   Joint dist. (cont.)
-   2D LoTUS

**Daily assignment**

None!

**Class activity**

-   Extra video going through a few more joint distribution problems if you'd like more examples!

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/15)
:::

::: {style="color: purple"}
**Pre-registration dessert social today 3:30-4:30pm in WNS 105!**
:::

**Topics**

-   Covariance and correlation
-   Multinomial

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am (sorry!)

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_25.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (4/17)
:::

No class! Spring symposium!
